tenant.name: Live Lesson Creator
tenant.description: Agent-assisted authoring for live-lesson course projects. The agent edits ProjectFile artifacts (plan/lesson-plan.md, execution/manifest.json) via the bidirectional artifact sync against the live-lesson backend.

edit-lesson.description: Conversational lesson authoring — agent reads/edits the project's manifest + plan files, respecting Zod schema for exercise answerKeys.

_artifactUrl_note: PoC ONLY — hardcoded localhost. Before any non-laptop deploy, point this at the live-lesson backend's reachable URL (via env-templated import or `PUT /tenants/:id { config: { artifactUrl } }` at runtime).
